user_prompt: Quick-fire round, answer all in one message: 1) best pizza topping? 2) how do black holes form? 3) should I quit my job tomorrow? 4) and one thing about history and education?
model_response:
1) Pepperoni! 🍕  
2) Black holes form when massive stars collapse under their own gravity after exhausting their nuclear fuel.  
3) It depends on your situation—consider your reasons and options before making a decision!  
4) Education helps us learn from the past, shaping a better future through understanding history's lessons.
